CVE-2025-65430.title: An issue was discovered in allauth-django before 65.13.0. IdP: ma ...
CVE-2025-65430.description: An issue was discovered in allauth-django before 65.13.0. IdP: marking a user as is_active=False after having handed tokens for that user while the account was still active had no effect. Fixed the access/refresh tokens are now rejected.

CVE-2025-65431.title: An issue was discovered in allauth-django before 65.13.0. Both Ok ...
CVE-2025-65431.description: An issue was discovered in allauth-django before 65.13.0. Both Okta and NetIQ were using preferred_username as the identifier for third-party provider accounts. That value may be mutable and should therefore be avoided for authorization decisions. The providers are now using sub instead.

CVE-2026-27982.title: An open redirect vulnerability exists in django-allauth versions  ...
CVE-2026-27982.description: An open redirect vulnerability exists in django-allauth versions prior to 65.14.1 when SAML IdP initiated SSO is enabled (it is disabled by default), which may allow an attacker to redirect users to an arbitrary external website via a crafted URL.
